name: railguey
description: Wrap the railguey CLI for reliable, project-token Railway deploys.

interface.longDescription: Railguey gives Codex a safe operating guide for Railway deploys through the railguey CLI. Use it instead of the Railway CLI when a workspace has a project-scoped RAILWAY_TOKEN in .env.local and needs deploys, domains, logs, service status, or post-deploy proof.
defaultPrompt: Use railguey to deploy this repo.
Check Railway service status with railguey.
Add a Railway custom domain with railguey.
